title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Alkem Laboratories Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Alkem Laboratories Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Alkem Laboratories Capital India are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Alkem Laboratories Capital India:
Alkem Laboratories Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alkem Laboratories Capital India!
